payload.title: Fall Application Deadline
payload.text: Northmoor University sets the Fall undergraduate application deadline at March 1. A non-refundable application fee of $50 applies to all first-year applicants.

_debug.note: Baseline fact. Nothing to conflict with yet.

payload.title: Library Hours
payload.text: The Hartwell Library operates from 8:00 to 22:00 Monday through Friday, and 10:00 to 18:00 on weekends.

_debug.note: Off-topic. Must NEVER be flagged against admissions docs. Catches over-broad candidate discovery.

payload.title: Dean of Admissions
payload.text: Dr. Elena Vance currently serves as Dean of Admissions at Northmoor University.

_debug.establishes: entity Elena Vance = Dean of Admissions
_debug.note: Establishes the entity later contradicted by seq 7.

payload.title: Apply for Autumn Intake
payload.text: First-year students applying to Northmoor for the autumn intake must submit their application by the first of March. The $50 first-year application charge is non-refundable.

_debug.note: Same facts as seq 1 (March 1, $50) but reworded ('autumn intake'/'first of March'). Tests paraphrase-duplicate detection; lower lexical overlap pressures symbolic-vs-semantic matching.

payload.title: Updated Application Fee
payload.text: The application fee for first-year admission to Northmoor is now $75.

_debug.note: High-overlap, easy case. Every baseline should catch this.

payload.title: Fall Application Deadline (Extended)
payload.text: Northmoor University has extended the Fall undergraduate application deadline to April 1. The application fee remains $50 for first-year applicants.

_debug.note: DIACHRONIC case. Supersedes own v1. Ripple: seq 4 (duplicate of old v1) becomes stale; seq 5 ($75) still contradicts this v2's $50 claim. Tests retroactive re-validation.

payload.title: Admissions Leadership Change
payload.text: Marcus Reed has been appointed to lead Northmoor's admissions office, effective immediately.

_debug.note: LOW embedding overlap with seq 3 (different name, 'Dean of Admissions' vs 'lead admissions office'). Shared entity = admissions office. Vector-only likely MISSES; graph-only/hybrid catch via shared-entity traversal. Key discriminating case.

payload.title: Admissions Quick Reference
payload.text: Admissions quick reference: apply by March 1, pay the $50 fee, and direct questions to Dean of Admissions Elena Vance.

_debug.note: ARTIFACT derived_from seq 1 + seq 3. Stale on TWO counts: deadline (April 1 per seq 6) and admissions head (Reed per seq 7). Tests derived_from dependency + orphan/stale detection. Pure-structural win for graph-only.

payload.title: Welcome Seminar
payload.text: Dr. Elena Vance will host a welcome seminar for incoming students in early September.

_debug.note: Shares entity 'Elena Vance' with seq 3/7/8 but introduces NO conflict. Must NOT be flagged. Critical FP control for the entity-mediated path: entity-sharing alone must not over-flag.

payload.title: Fee Waiver
payload.text: Effective for the next cycle, Northmoor will waive the application fee entirely for first-year applicants.

_debug.note: Builds fee chain: seq1 ($50) -> seq5 ($75) -> seq10 (waived). Graph-only reaches the chain via supersedes-edge traversal; metadata-only's flat filter misses the transitive link. Tests chain traversal.
